content:
✨ sglang | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Serving large language models and multimodal models with high performance and low latency for inference.
✨ Key Features: • High-performance inference for LLMs and multimodal models • Optimized attention mechanisms (e.g., FlashAttention, PagedAttention) • Support for a wide array of open-source models (Llama, Mistral, Qwen, etc.) • Day-0 support for new model releases
📖 Summary: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework designed for efficient inference of large language models (LLMs) and multimodal models. It offers advanced features like optimized attention mechanisms and supports a wide range of popular models, enabling faster and more scalable AI deployments.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
